{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20582_1
|class_id=20582
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=collection@20582_2
|fame=13
|art=18
|fth=15
|civ=30
|tech=14
|ss1=Snail HP +100<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail RUSH +1<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300
|ss2=Snail HP +200<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail RUSH +2<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300
|ss3=Snail HP +300<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail RUSH +3<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300
|ss4=Snail HP +300<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail RUSH +3<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300
|ss7=Snail HP +300<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail RUSH +3<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300<br> (Awakened)
}}
